final:
// // This module implements an OR logic circuit instead of an AND logic circuit.
module top_module(
    input [3:0] A,
    input [3:0] B,
    input reset,
    output reg [3:0] C
);always @(A, B, reset) begin
    if(reset) begin
        C <= 4'b0000;
    end else begin
        C <= A & B;
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements an OR logic circuit instead of an AND logic circuit.
